name: Jarnail Singh
quote: Deeply concerned by the deteriorating health of Sonam Wangchuk ji, who has now lost more than 8.5 kg during his indefinite hunger strike. The aspirations and voices of our youth deserve to be heard, not ignored. I extend my full solidarity to @Wangchuk66 and the CJP team at Jantar Mantar. It is imperative that the government begins meaningful dialogue without any further delay.
